{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Kameira orange
| introduced = Of Killers and Kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]]'s eyes were [[Kameira orange]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
